Headline: #70 Division Temporary Reroute at Division & Kolmar
ShortDescription: 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Division, Cicero, Augusta, Kostner, Division, over regular route near Division & Kolmar.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Division, Cicero, Augusta, Kostner, Division, over regular route, due to a flooded viaduct near Division & Kolmar.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: # 53 Pulaski Temporary Northbound Reroute near Pulaski & Victoria
ShortDescription: Northbound 53 buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Bryn Mawr, Kimball, Peterson, Pulaski, over regular route near Pulaski & Victoria.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Bryn Mawr, Kimball, Peterson, Pulaski, over regular route near Pulaski & Victoria. 

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Service Delayed near UIC/Halsted
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are standing near UIC/Halsted due to a sick customer. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are standing near UIC/Halsted due to a sick customer.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#20 Madison

#7 Harrison

#8 Halsted
 

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
